methodology.data_source: Requires Google Search Console position data
methodology.identification: Filter queries where avg position is 11-20 and impressions > 10
methodology.prioritization: Rank by: impressions (highest first), then by how close to position 10

for_each_page_2_target.details: Ensure primary keyword is in first 30 chars. Add power words. Include year (2026). Keep under 60 chars.
for_each_page_2_target.example: Before: 'Dog Bed Buying Guide' -> After: '10 Best Dog Beds UK 2026: Expert Tested Guide'

for_each_page_2_target.details: Include primary keyword, value proposition, and CTA. Target 150-160 chars.
for_each_page_2_target.example: Before: 'Read our guide on dog beds.' -> After: 'Compare the 10 best dog beds tested for UK dogs in 2026. Size guides, material ratings, and prices from 15 GBP. Find the perfect bed today.'

for_each_page_2_target.details: Add 3-5 additional FAQ questions targeting related 'People Also Ask' queries
for_each_page_2_target.impact: Increases content relevance and FAQ rich snippet eligibility

for_each_page_2_target.details: Add 3-5 internal links from top authority pages to the target page
If under 2000 words, expand with additional sections, data, comparisons
for_each_page_2_target.impact: More comprehensive content tends to rank higher

for_each_page_2_target.details: Structure a 40-60 word paragraph definition, numbered list, or comparison table
for_each_page_2_target.impact: Can jump directly to position 0 (featured snippet)

estimated_opportunity.assumption: With 460 posts, estimated 70-115 may be ranking on page 2-3
estimated_opportunity.traffic_impact: Each page 1 promotion typically increases clicks 3-5x vs page 2
estimated_opportunity.estimated_additional_clicks: 200-500 additional monthly clicks from 10 successful promotions

improvement_tactics: FAQ rich snippets (already deployed on 450 posts)

execution_requirements.needed: Google Search Console query + page data (positions, impressions, clicks, CTR)
execution_requirements.alternative: If GSC API not available, can use sitemap submission verification + manual query checks
execution_requirements.timeline: Once GSC data available: 2-3 days for full optimization pass on top 50 targets

status: PLAYBOOK READY - Requires GSC position data for targeted execution
